parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify((() => { const cands = $('篩選候選').all().map(i => i.json.contract_no).filter(Boolean); const conds = cands.length ? cands.map(c => ({ property: '案件編號', rich_text: { equals: c } })) : [{ property: '案件編號', rich_text: { equals: '__none__' } }]; return { filter: { or: conds }, page_size: 100 }; })()) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: '07ee845168b64f8a9b5682e5069c733b' }, properties: { '案名': { title: [{ text: { content: $json['案名'] || $json.contract_no } }] }, '案件編號': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.contract_no } }] }, '社區名稱': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: String($json['社區']||'') } }] }, '地址': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: String($json['地址']||'') } }] }, '建物類型': $json['建物類型'] ? { select: { name: String($json['建物類型']).replace(/^[A-Z]\./,'') } } : { select: null }, '格局': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: String($json['格局']||'') } }] }, '樓層': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: String($json['樓層']||'') } }] }, '屋齡': { number: $json['屋齡'] }, '總價': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($json['總價萬']!=null? $json['總價萬']+' 萬':'') } }] }, '主建物坪數': { number: $json['主建坪'] }, '建物坪數': { number: $json['建物坪'] }, '粉專文案': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: String($json['粉專文案']||'').slice(0,1900) } }] }, '社團文案': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: String($json['社團文案']||'').slice(0,1900) } }] }, '來源連結': { url: $json['official_url'] || null }, '狀態': { select: { name: '待發' } }, '專員': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: String($json['專員']||'') } }] }, '所屬門市': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: String($json['門市']||'') } }] }, 'KEIS物件ID': { number: ($json.keisId != null ? Number($json.keisId) : null) } } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ to: 'Ufab42c56b2eb9b9a9ff18c367b85a6dd', messages: [{ type: 'text', text: `🛑 已攔截 ${$json.contract_no}，這件不發。` }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify(($json.fbids && $json.fbids.length) ? { message: $json['粉專文案'], attached_media: $json.fbids.map(id => ({ media_fbid: id })) } : { message: $json['粉專文案'] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { '粉專貼文連結': { url: $json.permalink || null }, '狀態': { select: { name: '已發布' } } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ adcase_title: String($json['案名'] || $json.contract_no).slice(0,100), adcase_url: $json.ycUrl, adcase_member: '薛力瑜', adcase_road: String($json.adcaseRoad || '').slice(0,60), adcase_price: $json['總價萬'] ?? null, adcase_urlfacebook: $json.permalink || '', adcase_platforms: '臉書', adcase_memo: $json.contract_no + '｜n8n 廣告v3 自動建立' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { 'KEIS廣告ID': { number: $json.keisAdcaseId }, '永慶官網連結': { url: $json.ycUrl || null }, 'KEIS同步': { select: { name: $json.keisAdcaseId ? '已同步' : '未同步' } } } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ to: 'Ufab42c56b2eb9b9a9ff18c367b85a6dd', messages: [{ type: 'text', text: `🚨 廣告線停跑：KEIS 列表少了欄位 ${($json._missing||[]).join('、')}（撈到 ${$json._count} 筆）。這輪沒發，要修程式。` }] }) }}
